summary: Full backend + frontend regression for new PROTECTED /admin/residence-explorer (sales tool). 32/32 pytest backend tests pass (added 1 new sales_explorer-with-protected-fields test). Frontend explorer fully verified: auth gate, 4 building cards w/ correct counts, building->floor->unit drilldown, detail panel (Bed/Bath/Surface/Living/Balcony/Price/Status), 2-plan penthouse, 4-plan townhouse, floorplan modal, room breakdown, full-plan-set Dropbox link, inquiry form (consent gating + successful submit), filters (status & type), reset, breadcrumb, noindex meta, /robots.txt Disallow /admin. Lead persistence verified end-to-end: A101 inquiry shows up in /api/admin/leads with lead_type=sales_explorer + unit_living=1532, unit_floor='1st Floor', unit_status=available, residence_type='2 Bedroom Residence'. PUBLIC compliance check: /residences list and /residences/a102 do NOT display bedroom/bathroom counts, per-unit floor plan images, or per-unit room breakdown (feature copy mentioning 'master bedroom' / 'open floor plans' is generic spec text, not per-unit data).

design_issues.screen: LeadForm (used in /admin/residence-explorer inquiry & all public forms)
issues: Consent copy in src/lib/constants.js LEGAL.consentText references 'Evo Home' instead of 'Grosvenor Vistas' — visible to admin sales team and public visitors. Branding leak.

verification_details.drilldown: Heliconia -> 1st Floor -> A101 opens detail panel with Bed/Bath/Total/Living/Balcony/Price/Status, 1 floor plan (Residence Plan), 8-row room breakdown, Dropbox download link present
verification_details.penthouse_a402: Floor 4 -> A402 (3,135 sqft) shows 2 plans: floorplan-lower-level + floorplan-upper-level — opens floorplan-modal
verification_details.townhouse_begonia: Townhouse 1 & 2 (4,845 sqft) each show 4 plans: Basement, 1st Floor, 2nd Floor, Rooftop
verification_details.filters: filter-status=sold -> Heliconia count drops to 2; filter-type='4 Bedroom Townhouse' -> Heliconia=0, Begonia=2; explorer-reset returns to 4-building grid

inquiry_submission.no_consent: submit blocked (form not submitted, no success toast)
inquiry_submission.with_consent: submission succeeded — lead created and form area reset

public_compliance./residences: no bedroom/bathroom counts, no per-unit floor-plan images (0 imgs matching /floorplan/)
public_compliance./residences/a102: header shows Living Area / Balcony / Total Surface / Price ONLY — no Bed/Bath count, no room breakdown, no floor plan image. Generic features list mentions 'master bedroom with ensuite bathroom' and 'open floor plans' as standard spec text — not a per-unit disclosure.

action_items: Update LEGAL.consentText in /app/frontend/src/lib/constants.js — replace 'Evo Home' with 'Grosvenor Vistas' (or correct legal entity). This text is shown to BOTH the public AND the admin sales team in every lead form.
critical_code_review_comments: LeadForm consent text leaks 'Evo Home' branding (constants.js line 28) — must be rebranded.

ResidenceExplorer.jsx pickBuilding(null) trick on line 101 ('onClick={() => pickBuilding(null) || setBuilding(null)}') is a no-op double-call — pickBuilding(null) already sets building=null. Cosmetic.

explorerData.js getUnitType keys on surface alone; if CRM ever returns a 1,671 sqft unit in Begonia it would be classified as 2BR — consider keying on (building, unit_number) or adding a unit_type column server-side for robustness.
FULL_PLANS_URL is a hard-coded Dropbox link in client code — fine for now but easily leaked if anyone copies the URL; consider a server-side gated endpoint that checks JWT before redirecting.
seed_data_creation: 1 sales_explorer lead created via UI for A101; 1 sales_explorer lead created via pytest for A402 — both visible in /api/admin/leads
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 32 backend tests pass via pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_grosvenor_api.py. ResidenceExplorer page is fully wired and integration with backend leads + sales_explorer enum + new schema fields (unit_living/unit_floor/unit_status/residence_type) is end-to-end verified. Single remaining issue is the 'Evo Home' string in constants.js consent text which affects every form site-wide.
rca of the issue: LEGAL.consentText in /app/frontend/src/lib/constants.js (line 28) is a generic template string that was not customized for Grosvenor Vistas during the white-label rebrand. Replace 'Evo Home' with the correct legal entity. No functional impact, but legal/branding compliance issue.
